name: Notion
description: Connect your Notion workspace to read, create, and manage pages and databases
description_zh: 连接你的 Notion 工作区，读取、创建和管理页面与数据库

mcp_config.name: notion
mcp_config.description: Notion workspace integration - read, search, create pages and databases

auth.help_text: Create an internal integration at notion.so/my-integrations and copy the token
auth.help_text_zh: 在 notion.so/my-integrations 创建内部集成并复制令牌

name: Todoist
description: Manage tasks, projects, and reminders in Todoist
description_zh: 管理 Todoist 中的任务、项目和提醒

mcp_config.name: todoist
mcp_config.description: Todoist task management - create, update, complete tasks and projects

auth.help_text: Go to Todoist Settings → Integrations → Developer and copy your API token
auth.help_text_zh: 前往 Todoist 设置 → 集成 → 开发者，复制 API 令牌

name: Google Calendar
description: View and manage your Google Calendar events and schedules
description_zh: 查看和管理你的 Google 日历事件和日程安排

mcp_config.name: google-calendar
mcp_config.description: Google Calendar - list, create, update, delete calendar events

auth.help_text: Create OAuth 2.0 credentials in Google Cloud Console, then authorize access
auth.help_text_zh: 在 Google Cloud Console 创建 OAuth 2.0 凭据，然后授权访问

name: Linear
description: Manage issues, projects, and cycles in Linear
description_zh: 管理 Linear 中的问题、项目和迭代周期

mcp_config.name: linear
mcp_config.description: Linear project management - issues, projects, cycles, teams

auth.help_text: Go to Linear Settings → API and create a personal API key
auth.help_text_zh: 前往 Linear 设置 → API，创建个人 API 密钥
